_README: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for what the two skills scrape and enrich. This is the SHIPPED DEFAULT (Customer Success Manager). The live, user-edited copy is search_config.json (gitignored). The scraper and enrichment skills load the live config at the START of every run - scheduled or on-demand - and use ONLY these values for every scraping and enrichment decision. To retarget, follow RETARGETING.md, which edits the live search_config.json. Never edit knob values inline in the skills; edit them here.
_filters_note: exclude_work_permit_required skips a posting only when its description contains a work_permit_block_phrases entry (explicit 'no sponsorship' language); postings that are silent on sponsorship are KEPT. It is a config toggle - set to false to disable. The work_authorization column records what was detected per kept job.

scraper.work_permit_label: skip jobs that explicitly won't sponsor
work_permit_block_phrases: now or in the future without sponsorship

contact_tiers.who: Person actively hiring for this role
CS Director / Sr. Director overseeing the team
Individual contributor on the same segment team
GM, VP, CRO, CCO or similar

enrichment.dm_tone: Warm and peer-to-peer. Reference the specific role and team. No hard sell.
enrichment.cover_letter_emphasis: Customer Success outcomes: retention, relationship management, driving product adoption.
